name: ART-AD lamivudine early Alzheimer's trial
summary: A 24-week open-label phase IIa trial of daily 300 mg 3TC in early Alzheimer's disease, designed to test safety, tolerability, feasibility, CNS penetration, target engagement, and exploratory biomarkers.
population: Participants aged 50-99 with early Alzheimer's disease, MMSE greater than 24, and CDR of 0.5
